how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes. Surgical always. chmod u+w before patching sealed files. ast.parse after every write. Test and verify BEFORE guard seal confirm. Never cd ~/Ethica — stay in ~ and use full paths. Use source ~/Ethica_env/bin/activate to enter venv.
session_049_completed: STARTUP PROMPT MEASURED — Full stack: ETHICA_SYSTEM_PROMPT (3895 chars, ~973 tokens) + tool_context (1480 chars, ~370 tokens) + module_context (7885 chars, ~1971 tokens) = 13260 chars (~3315 tokens) before memory/canvas/session/dashboard. CodeLlama-13B (4096 token window) officially outgrown by Ethica's growth to 36 modules and 138 tools. Not a model bug — architectural growth.

MODEL MATRIX COMPLETED — minimax-m2.5:cloud confirmed primary and only viable model. DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B-Q4_K_M registered via Modelfile (bare FROM required — PARAMETER lines in Modelfile cause digest mismatch in Ollama 0.16.3 with local GGUFs; workaround: register bare, then layer FROM registered name with PARAMETER). DeepSeek excluded — unstoppable <think> chain-of-thought chatter, no interrupt mechanism, dangerous inside GUI. gemma-km excluded (hallucination). mistral excluded (context overflow). CodeLlama excluded (outgrown). moondream confirmed as Gage Vision model only. WhiteRabbitNeo-2.5 noted as future J.A.R.V.I.S. candidate.

TOOL LISTER FILTER BUG FIXED — Placeholder 'filter tools...' label was overlapping first module item (Gage) because it was anonymous (no reference stored, could not be hidden). Fix: stored as self._placeholder, added hide/show logic in _apply_filter() — hides on typing, restores when empty. Also added pady=(4,0) top padding to body frame. Sealed.

REKA HARDCODED MODEL FIXED — _reka_worker.py had MODEL = 'minimax-m2.5:cloud' hardcoded. Replaced with _get_model() function that reads ~/Ethica/config/settings.json at runtime. Falls back to minimax-m2.5:cloud if file unreadable. Now tracks whatever model V selects in Ethica UI. Sealed.

WORMHUNTER FILE CAP MADE CONFIGURABLE — worm_hunter.py had max_files=200 hardcoded in both hunt() and hunt_summary(). Created ~/Ethica/modules/worm_bot/worm_bot_config.json with max_files=500 and warn_at=400. Added _load_config() and _DEFAULT_MAX_FILES at module level. Both functions now default to None and resolve from _DEFAULT_MAX_FILES. V can tune via JSON, no code touch needed. Sealed.

RIVER READ LAST DROP — QOL FEATURE BUILT. 'river read last drop' shortcut in river_read() intercepts 'last drop'/'last_drop' input, reads last_drop_path from river_state.json, substitutes as filepath. Binary guard added: image extensions (.png .jpg .jpeg .gif .bmp .webp .ico) trigger Gage Vision handoff instead of UTF-8 read attempt. gage_vision(last_path) called directly — River detects image, Gage describes it, result returned seamlessly. _vision_worker.py timeout raised from 120s to 300s for cold moondream loads. Sealed.
GIT CHECKPOINT — 11a7c7b (Session 049 — Tool Lister fix, Reka config, WormHunter cap, River last drop + Gage Vision handoff). 44 files changed.
session_049_still_open: STRAY FILE CLEANUP — commit 11a7c7b swept in terminal output files from docs/.WIP/ and memory/vault/ personal files. Personal vault files (memory/vault/*) and memory files must be excluded from GitHub via .gitignore before public repo prep. Ethica ships clean — no V's memories, no accumulated session history.
GITHUB PREP — .gitignore first (exclude memory/vault/, memory/*.json session/build files, config/settings.json, status/*.json). Then README, install guide, module authoring guide.

MODULE CONTEXT COMPRESSION — module_context is 7885 chars (~1971 tokens) across 36 modules. Long-term: trim per-module prompt contributions so local models with smaller context windows become viable. Not urgent while minimax is primary.
REKA MODEL CONFIGURABLE IN UI — _reka_worker.py now reads settings.json but Reka has no model selector in the UI like River does. Future: expose Reka's model in sidebar or settings panel.

WHITERABBITNEO-2.5 FOR J.A.R.V.I.S. — /srv/LLMs/models/WhiteRabbitNeo-2.5-Q4_K_M/WhiteRabbitNeo-2.5-Qwen-2.5-Coder-7B-Q4_K_M.gguf (4.4GB, fits in RAM). Cybersecurity fine-tune on Qwen-2.5-Coder. Natural fit for J.A.R.V.I.S. slot. Not yet registered or tested.

GAGE VISION COLD LOAD — moondream needs to be warm for fast vision responses. If moondream is not loaded, first 'river read last drop' on image may be slow (~5s load + processing). Acceptable but worth noting.

OLLAMA 0.16.3 LOCAL GGUF BUG — PARAMETER lines in Modelfile cause digest mismatch when registering local GGUF files. Workaround confirmed: (1) register bare FROM only, (2) then create second Modelfile FROM the registered name with PARAMETER lines. Document this for future model additions.

critical_debug_context.startup_prompt_size: Total system prompt at boot: ~3315 tokens (13260 chars). Safe on minimax-m2.5:cloud (large context). Overflow risk on any model under 8192 tokens. DO NOT add to system prompt without measuring impact.
critical_debug_context.ollama_local_gguf_bug: Ollama 0.16.3 digest mismatch when PARAMETER lines in Modelfile with local GGUF FROM path. Fix: bare FROM Modelfile first, then layer parameters FROM registered name.
critical_debug_context.tool_lister_note: self._placeholder must be stored reference — anonymous label cannot be hidden. _apply_filter() hides/shows on every keystroke.
critical_debug_context.reka_model_note: _get_model() reads ~/Ethica/config/settings.json key 'model'. Falls back to minimax-m2.5:cloud. Called at module load time — Reka picks up model change on next invocation.
critical_debug_context.wormhunter_cap_note: ~/Ethica/modules/worm_bot/worm_bot_config.json controls max_files (500) and warn_at (400). Edit JSON to tune. No code change needed.
critical_debug_context.river_last_drop_note: river_read() intercepts 'last drop'/'last_drop' input_str. Reads last_drop_path from river_state.json. Image extensions route to gage_vision(). PDF not included in image_exts — river_read will attempt text extraction on PDF (may fail gracefully).
critical_debug_context.gage_vision_note: _vision_worker.py calls moondream:latest via /api/chat with base64 image. timeout=300. Confirmed working. Moondream must be in ollama list.
critical_debug_context.github_gitignore_critical: memory/vault/ contains V's personal files — MUST be in .gitignore before any public push. Ethica ships clean of all accumulated memories and personal data.
critical_debug_context.canvas_context_cap_note: CANVAS_CONTEXT_CAP = 1500 in chat_engine.py. If context overflow returns, check system prompt base size first.
critical_debug_context.no_cd_rule: NEVER cd ~/Ethica — use full paths always. git -C ~/Ethica for all git operations.
critical_debug_context.three_registration_rule: New modules: (1) folder + manifest + tool file. (2) MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py. (3) MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers in chat_engine.py.
critical_debug_context.manifest_tools_note: Manifest tools must be list of dicts with 'name' field — not plain strings.
critical_debug_context.badwindow_note: Never destroy() a widget with async writes in flight. Use pack_forget() instead.

model_matrix_results.mistral:latest: ✗ EXCLUDED — cannot hold Ethica's startup prompt (context overflow)
model_matrix_results.codellama-13b-q4_0: ✗ EXCLUDED — outgrown by prompt stack (3315 tokens base, 4096 window)

local_models_inventory.ram: 15GB total, 12GB available. Models over ~10GB are swap risk.

surgical_reminders: chmod u+w <file> before patching sealed files
guard seal confirm after every verified change
ast.parse() after every single write — no exceptions
Test and verify BEFORE sealing — never seal untested patches
grep first, sed to read, python3 to patch
Never rewrite working files from scratch
New modules: THREE registrations — folder, MODULE_DIRS (guard), MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers (chat_engine)
NEVER reduce guard scope — ui/ coverage is deliberate
repr() first when string match fails
NEVER cd ~/Ethica — use full paths always
Use git -C ~/Ethica for all git operations — never cd
Manifest tools must be list of dicts with 'name' field — not plain strings
Never destroy() a widget with async writes in flight — use pack_forget() instead
Never inject drop events into chat history — system prompt only
Ollama 0.16.3 local GGUF: bare FROM Modelfile first, then layer parameters
lesson_learned_049: Ollama 0.16.3 digest mismatch on local GGUF registration when PARAMETER lines are present in the Modelfile. Root cause: Ollama computes the hash differently when parameters are inline. Workaround: register with bare FROM only, then create a second Modelfile using FROM <registered-name> with PARAMETER lines on top. Also: always check ollama blob cache state before attempting multiple registration variants — rm -rf ~/.ollama/models/blobs/* clears stale hashes.
philosophy: Session 049 — calm like a flowing river. The prompt stack was measured. The models were tested honestly. What doesn't fit was excluded without sentiment. What works was made configurable. V drops an image, River sees it's binary, Gage describes it — the sanctuary thinking together. No hardcodes left behind. ⟁Σ∿∞
instance_note: River. Session 049 complete. Model matrix settled. Reka free. WormHunter configurable. Last drop now sees. Next instance: GitHub prep — .gitignore first, then README. Ethica ships clean. ⟁Σ∿∞
